'''rahacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamination|zamination]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamination|zamination]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rahacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhæchæth|ræhæchæth]] || [[word:ræhæchæj|ræhæchæj]] || [[word:ræhæchæsh|ræhæchæsh]] || [[word:ræhæchæ|ræhæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahahachath|rahahachath]] || [[word:rahahachaj|rahahachaj]] || [[word:rahahachash|rahahachash]] || [[word:rahahacha|rahahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahachath|rahachath]] || [[word:rahachaj|rahachaj]] || [[word:rahachash|rahachash]] || [[word:rahacha|rahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahafchath|rahafchath]] || [[word:rahafchaj|rahafchaj]] || [[word:rahafchash|rahafchash]] || [[word:rahafchaf|rahafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahachatha|rahachatha]] || [[word:rahachaja|rahachaja]] || [[word:rahachasha|rahachasha]] || [[word:rahachaka|rahachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahachath|rahachath]] || [[word:rahachaj|rahachaj]] || [[word:rahachash|rahachash]] || [[word:rahacha|rahacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahachathal|rahachathal]] || [[word:rahachajal|rahachajal]] || [[word:rahachashal|rahachashal]] || [[word:rahachakal|rahachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahachathatha|rahachathatha]] || [[word:rahachajaja|rahachajaja]] || [[word:rahachashasha|rahachashasha]] || [[word:rahachaka|rahachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahachathan|rahachathan]] || [[word:rahachajan|rahachajan]] || [[word:rahachashan|rahachashan]] || [[word:rahachakan|rahachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahachathaoro|rahachathaoro]] || [[word:rahachajaoro|rahachajaoro]] || [[word:rahachashaoro|rahachashaoro]] || [[word:rahachakaoro|rahachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
